src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: 'serialVersionUID' is not allowed to be annotated with @Serial unless it is a field of a serializable class and the annotation is used correctly; more importantly, in newer Java versions (and strict module systems), accessing or defining serializable fields without proper encapsulation or annotation can lead to warnings or errors depending on compiler flags, but primarily this is a modernization to use the new @Serial annotation introduced in Java 14 for serializable fields.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE to Jakarta EE to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+; using the old java.sun.com namespace causes deployment failures or classloading errors because the container expects jakarta.* packages and descriptors.

src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace static import of String.format with the String.formatted() instance method introduced in Java 15.
src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: While String.format still exists, the migration intent is to adopt the newer fluent API style; however, strictly speaking, the old code compiles on Java 21. This is a stylistic modernization.
